note: measured champions a fresh clone needs to run real campaigns; sha256 cross-checked against the campaigns' results.json records at upload time. Detection-head entries carry a 'wm' field naming the lock entry of the latent they were trained on — a head is only valid with its WM (planner/flight_mode.py --verify cross-checks the binding).

artifacts.name: world_model.pth
artifacts.what: the G1 world model (v0.2 champion; == world_model_g1.pth, cmp-verified)

artifacts.name: world_model_unified.pth
artifacts.what: unified WM (transit+indoor union) — WMPolicy transit + indoor detection; shipped ALONGSIDE the champion, never overwriting it (indoor_search flight mode)

artifacts.name: ppo_wm_policy_edge_hard_xp.zip
artifacts.what: the general champion policy (v0.3: hard worlds + odometry pin + edge diet)

artifacts.name: ppo_moving_gap_v2_K3.zip
artifacts.what: the moving-gap v2 champion (also threads the closing door zero-shot)

artifacts.name: target_head_yaw.pt
artifacts.what: indoor detection head on the frozen unified-WM latent, yaw-swept frames (AUC 0.982, obstacle-FA 0.021; yaw_v1) — the yaw spin-scan search head

artifacts.name: target_head_low.pt
artifacts.what: indoor detection head, multi-height + near-floor frames (0.4 m 0.66->0.90, z=0.15 m AUC 0.83; alt_v1) — the vertical/multi-altitude search head

artifacts.name: target_head_person.pt
artifacts.what: person detection head (AUC 0.918, shape-only probe 0.806; person_v1) — the find-a-person choreography head (find+return 0.933, n=15)

quantized.note: measured int8 deployment CONFIGS, adopted 2026-07-13 (owner's call). No separate binaries: each config is DERIVED at load by fake-quantizing the pinned float WM (NNTool SQ8 shape) with the recipe below — eval/eval_int8_parity.py owns the machinery, its selftest asserts these entries against the committed campaign records, and planner/flight_mode.py --verify checks the wm references. Honesty: the recipes calibrate on the training corpora (output/*.npz), which are regenerated, not shipped.

transit.weights: int8 symmetric, per-channel convs / per-tensor linears
transit.activations: uint8 min/max; split-scale quant node at the pred z||action concat seam; int16 activations on pred.* leaves

trigger.what: WMPolicy thresholds quantile-matched to the float operating point on the quantized landscape (train seeds 3000+; float constants 0.4/0.5)

evidence.gate: B4 closed-loop pooled n=126: delta-crash +0.0159 (bar +0.030), false-evasion 0.0556 -> PARITY

transit.what: the quantized transit WMPolicy arm (the unified WM is the embedded-path artifact per Q1's ruling; the float transit flight mode continues to fly the pinned champion)

indoor_search.weights: int8 symmetric, per-channel convs / per-tensor linears
indoor_search.heads: shipped heads as pinned above, ZERO refits (the qlat refit artifacts of int8_parity_v1 are retired by low_head_int8_v1)

evidence.gate: B5 flight 0.80 correct / 0.00 FA / 0.00 collision / 0.95 return (best on record); B3 shipped heads all pass; B1/B2 guards green

indoor_search.what: the quantized indoor stack: unified WM + shipped detection heads under regime-complete calibration
